site.headline: A church family in the heart of Townsville
site.welcome: Come along exactly as you are. We gather every Sunday to hear God's word, sing, pray and share time together.

events.title: Sunday services
events.detail: 9:00am traditional service and 10:30am contemporary service at 119 Wills Street.

events.title: Pressy Youth Townsville
events.detail: Grades 7 to 12, Friday during school term at Willows Presbyterian Church.
